images.alt:
🪩 Generate AI product shoots for your fitness and wellness brand ↓

Every new drop needs new content.

Every new design, every new set, every new product added to your range.
That adds up fast. And so does the cost.

AI gives you a way to keep up with your own product releases without booking a new shoot every single time.

Fitness and wellness brands can now generate complete product shoots from scratch.

A new yoga mat, a new set, a new campaign direction. All without a full production team.

👉🏼 Generate your product in any scene or environment
👉🏼 Add models in real lifestyle and studio settings
👉🏼 Style with props and scene context that fits your brand
👉🏼 Shoot from any angle without reshooting
👉🏼 Place your product in action shots that feel authentic
👉🏼 Scale across your entire campaign in minutes

But here’s the thing…
AI alone won’t get you there.

The difference between a campaign that looks professional and one that looks generated comes down to strategy and editing.

P.S. We’ve summarised our strategy to generate consistent AI imagery in 180+ pages.

Comment “editz” and grab the guide!

🪩 Nano Banana 2 vs GPT Image 2 ↓

Two of the most powerful AI image models available right now. But which one is actually better for your brand?

We tested both using the same prompts across watches, packaging, models, lifestyle shots and eyewear. Swipe through to see the difference for yourself.

The truth is, they’re not competing. They each have strengths depending on what you’re trying to generate and knowing when to use which one is what separates good content from great content.

Because the model is only part of it. Knowing how to prompt, how to direct and how to build a workflow around both? 
That’s the skill.

➡️ Comment "scale" and learn how to use GPT Image 2 inside Claude for your brand!

Follow @mobileeditingclub for more editing and AI tips and news.

#ai #aiediting #aiimages #nanobanana #gptimage2

🪩 GPT Image 2 just dropped and it’s incredible ↓

But the brands getting the most out of it aren’t just using it to generate pretty images. 

They’re letting Claude run the entire creative workflow pipeline that used to take months and cost six figures.

If they need print-ready marketing assets in every format, Claude briefs the strategy, and GPT Image 2 generates everything from Story reels to website banners.

If they need to test packaging variants before going into production, Claude creates the direction, and GPT Image 2 handles the mockups.

If they have existing marketing materials that need repurposing, Claude reformats and rewrites everything for the next stage of the customer journey, and GPT Image 2 visualizes it.

If they need infographics and explanatory content that help their audience understand their product, Claude runs the pipeline, and GPT Image 2 visualizes it.

Brands that have both in their workflow aren’t just moving faster. They’re producing more, testing more, and scaling more without the usual time and cost.

Now it’s time to learn how.

🪩 Generate AI product shoots for your eyewear brand ↓

Every new drop needs new content. Every new frame, every new colorway, every new style added to your range.
That adds up fast. And so does the cost.

AI gives you a way to keep up with your own product releases without booking a new shoot every single time.

Eyewear brands can now generate complete product shoots from scratch. A new frame, a new lens color, a new campaign direction. All without a full production team.

👉🏼 Generate your product in any scene or setting 
👉🏼 Detail shots that show the craft and quality of the frame 
👉🏼 Model shots in real lifestyle environments 
👉🏼 Creative angles that make the product stand out 
👉🏼 Scale across your entire campaign in minutes

But here’s the thing...

AI alone won’t get you there. The difference between a campaign that looks professional and one that looks generated comes down to strategy and editing.

🪩 This is AI ↓

Most people scroll past AI images without even realizing it. 

The gap between AI-generated and real photography is closing faster than most people think.

We generated this model entirely with AI, no photoshoot needed. That’s how close AI actually gets when you know what you’re doing.

Perfection is often the opposite of what makes an image look human. And once you understand that, your campaigns stop looking like AI.

But without a strategy behind your prompts, you’re not getting these results.

🪩 Here’s how ↓

It’s now possible to generate campaign-quality visuals without a full production team.

But most people are writing vague prompts and wondering why the results don’t match what they had in mind.

Whether it’s a close-up shot of a pendant, a lifestyle scene or a full campaign visual, the quality of the output comes down to the precision of the input.

But it only works if it’s done properly. 
Otherwise, it can easily backfire.
